name: Choco Peanut Butter Dreams
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, beat together brown sugar, peanut butter, and margarine until fluffy.
3. Add water, egg, and vanilla extract; mix well.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients; stir until combined.
5. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Flatten each ball with a glass dipped in sugar.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
8. In a saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate and shortening, stirring constantly until smooth.
9. Spoon a small amount of melted chocolate onto each cookie.
10. Sprinkle chopped peanuts over the chocolate.
11. Allow the cookies to chill until set.
